data.title: SmartAlpha partners with GE HealthCare to launch Nerveblox™ - an AI solution for ultrasound-guided regional anesthesia. U.S. anesthesiologists experience the technology.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, in San Antonio, it was revealed that SmartAlpha has partnered with GE HealthCare to launch Nerveblox™, their AI innovation focused on supporting ultrasound-guided regional anesthesia. This collaboration marked the introduction of the technology to American anesthesiologists.

data.title: Stocks fluctuate with gold, silver rising, NuScale moves sharply. NuScale breaks out but fluctuates, traders cautious.
data.description: Today, NuScale exhibited significant volatility in the stock market. Although it made notable gains, it also experienced substantial fluctuations that may impact traders. Gold and silver prices led the upside movement as stock indexes gave up earlier gains. NuScale reversed direction sharply during the trading session.

data.title: Westgate Resorts in Gatlinburg named top destination in Smoky Mountains by Consumer365 in 2025.
data.description: In October 16, 2025, the Smoky Mountains remain a top attraction, with Gatlinburg drawing in millions of tourists annually due to its blend of stunning landscapes and cultural sites. The region has become one of the most sought-after destinations in the Southeast. Traveler preferences are now leaning towards resort accommodations...

data.title: IDACORP to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 30 before markets open. Conference call at 2:30pm MT / 4:30pm ET. Listen via webcast or call 855-761-5600. Passcode: 9290150.
data.description: On Thursday, October 30, IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE:IDA) will release its third-quarter financial results before the stock markets open. Following this, at 2:30 p.m. Mountain Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time), the company will conduct an analyst conference call to review the earnings from the third quarter of 2025. Interested parties can participate by tuning into a live Webcast or by dialing 855-761-5600 for listen-only mode using the passcode 9290150.

data.title: BlackRock launching redesigned money market fund for stablecoin issuers to comply with GENIUS Act. Treasury-heavy portfolio.
data.description: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) has rolled out a revamped money market fund known as the BlackRock Select Treasury Based Liquidity Fund (BSTBL) to comply with the recently passed GENIUS Act, marking the inaugural comprehensive U.S. federal guideline for stablecoins. The renewed BSTBL is customized for stablecoin creators obligated to uphold premium, liquid reserves under federal statutes. As reported by CNBC, the fund now features a portfolio heavily focused on Treasury securities, designed for token issuers functioning under U.S. supervision. This move supplements BlackRock's wider digital asset strategy, which already encompasses a range of initiatives.

data.title: Queen Elizabeth arrives in Miami for the first time, starting a Caribbean season with new dining and entertainment. Offering voyages from Oct to Apr.
data.description: New, locally influenced dining and top-tier entertainment by acclaimed Broadway and West End performers will be the main highlights of Caribbean voyages this season. A special ceremony was held in Miami to mark the arrival of the Cunard ship, which will serve as a homeport from October to April. The voyages will offer visitors a sun-soaked experience in the Caribbean region.

data.title: AI and autonomous agents revolutionizing DeFi, per OKX Ventures, boosting efficiency, lowering complexity, and enhancing user experience.
data.description: According to OKX Ventures, AI-powered autonomous agents are transforming decentralized finance (DeFi) by enhancing efficiency, simplifying processes, and elevating user interaction. This advanced technology is revolutionizing DeFi by streamlining operations and optimizing the user experience.

data.title: Token buybacks in 2025 surpassing $1.40B, led by Hyperliquid's HYPE token. LayerZero and Pump.fun also see significant activity.
data.description: In 2025, over $1.40 billion in token repurchases were recorded, with the HYPE token from Hyperliquid emerging as the top performer, based on data from CoinGecko. Significant buyback activities were also observed from LayerZero and Pump.fun in the same period.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market hits $4 trillion in Q3 2025, with record highs for ETH and BNB. DeFi, stablecoins grow too.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, the cryptocurrency market experienced a remarkable surge, reaching a total value of $4 trillion. This growth was primarily fueled by Ethereum and BNB reaching unprecedented peak levels, alongside substantial expansions in DeFi, stablecoins, and centralized exchange trading volumes.

data.title: Cronos (CRO) to launch 'Smarturn' upgrade on Oct 30, 2025, boosting EVM mainnet efficiency with smart accounts and better interoperability.
data.description: Cronos (CRO) has announced the launch of its 'Smarturn' upgrade scheduled for October 30, 2025. This upgrade will bring new functionalities such as smart accounts and enhanced interoperability to the EVM mainnet.

data.title: In Q3 2025, median home sale profit near 50% at $123,100; Typical price at $370,000 according to ATTOM data.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, the median profit from a home sale saw a substantial increase of 49.9 percent, equating to $123,100. This surge brought the typical sales price to $370,000. The data was revealed by ATTOM, a prominent expert in land, property information, and real estate analysis, based in Irvine, California.

data.title: Take-Two's stock hits record high with price-target hikes due to investor excitement for NBA 2K26 and Grand Theft Auto 6.
data.description: Take-Two Interactive Software's stock (TTWO) has reached record levels as investors show excitement for the company's current and future video game releases. The surge in stock price comes as price-target increases are announced for highly anticipated games such as 'NBA 2K26' and 'Grand Theft Auto 6'. This positive market sentiment has propelled TTWO's stock to new heights.

data.title: Palantir and Snowflake form partnership to modernize data for AI apps, causing their stocks to reverse down.
data.description: Two software companies have joined forces to assist businesses in updating data for AI applications. Amid this collaboration, Palantir's stock and Snowflake's stock experienced a decline. This development comes as they announced their new partnership, aiming to enhance data capabilities for AI technology.

data.title: Milken Institute to host Global Investors' Symposium in São Paulo on Nov 9-10 alongside COP30, first event in Brazil's city.
data.description: SÃO PAULO - Today, the Milken Institute revealed plans to host its prestigious Global Investors' Symposium in São Paulo, Brazil, for the first time. The event, scheduled for November 9-10, will coincide with the 30th Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (COP30). This symposium, focusing on the theme "Connecting Global", will bring together global investors and leaders for discussions on investment opportunities.

data.title: Kim Daly to speak at Franchise Springboard, launching free coaching for franchisees in Bedford, NH on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: This week in Bedford, New Hampshire, on October 16, 2025, The Zee Suite founder Kim Daly, an elite performance coach, will be sharing insights on mindset mastery as a key factor in achieving financial freedom, prosperity, and franchise growth. Daly's presentation at the Franchise Springboard event will provide valuable strategies and techniques for individuals looking to enhance their entrepreneurial journey.
